name: Deutsche Bahn Fahrplan
description: Query the Deutsche Bahn (DB) timetable via the community-maintained v6.db.transport.rest proxy over the official HAFAS API. Search stations, look up departures/arrivals in real time, and plan journeys between any two DB stops.
instructions:
This connector uses https://v6.db.transport.rest — a free, no-auth wrapper around Deutsche Bahn's HAFAS endpoints maintained by the public-transport community.

**No authentication required**, but the service is hosted best-effort — for production use you may want to self-host (see https://github.com/derhuerst/db-rest).

**Typical workflow**:
1. Resolve a station name to a stop `id` with `db_search_locations`
2. Call `db_get_departures` or `db_get_arrivals` with that id
3. For trip planning, use `db_get_journeys` with `from` and `to` stop ids

**Time format**: All times are ISO 8601 with timezone (e.g. `2026-04-21T08:30+02:00`). If omitted, `when` defaults to now.

**Delay tracking**: departure/arrival entries include `delay` in seconds, `cancelled`, and `platform` vs `plannedPlatform` for live monitoring.

**Multi-modal**: results can include S-Bahn, U-Bahn, bus, tram where operated by DB or partner agencies.

tools.name: db_search_locations
tools.description: Search for DB stops/stations, addresses, or points of interest by name. Returns a list of matches with id, name, type, and geo coordinates. Use the returned id with other tools.

tools.name: db_get_stop
tools.description: Retrieve details for a specific stop/station by its DB id, including name, location, station category, and products served (ICE, IC, RE, S, etc.).

id.description: The stop id from db_search_locations (e.g. '8000105' for Frankfurt(Main)Hbf).

tools.name: db_get_departures
tools.description: List upcoming departures from a stop. Returns each departure with line, destination (direction), planned and actual time, platform, delay in seconds, and cancellation status.

when.description: ISO 8601 timestamp for the reference time (default: now). Example: '2026-04-21T08:30+02:00'.

tools.name: db_get_arrivals
tools.description: List upcoming arrivals at a stop with origin, planned and actual time, platform, delay, and cancellation status.

tools.name: db_get_journeys
tools.description: Plan a journey between two stops. Returns one or more itinerary options with legs (train/bus/S-Bahn), departure and arrival times per leg, transfers, duration, and any delays. Use stop ids from db_search_locations.

departure.description: Desired departure time (ISO 8601). Defaults to now. Use either 'departure' or 'arrival', not both.

arrival.description: Desired latest arrival time (ISO 8601). Use for 'arrive by' queries.

results.description: Number of itinerary options to return (default: 3).
